vocab.example: He was a mentor I truly looked up to because of his profound wisdom and kindness.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy, làm bộc lộ (khả năng hoặc phẩm chất tốt)
vocab.example: My English teacher really knew how to bring out the best in her students, even the shy ones.

vocab.meaning: thấm thía, dần hiểu ra (bài học hoặc kiến thức)
vocab.example: He had a way of explaining complex physics concepts until they finally began to sink in.

vocab.meaning: truyền đạt thành công, làm cho ai đó hiểu/tin mình
vocab.example: She was the only educator who could really get through to me when I was going through a rebellious phase.

vocab.meaning: nổi bật, khác biệt hoàn toàn (so với những người khác)
vocab.example: Out of all my lecturers, Mr. Smith stood out due to his incredibly engaging storytelling style.

vocab.meaning: mở đường cho, tạo điều kiện cho (thành công tương lai)
vocab.example: Her constant encouragement paved the way for my eventual career in fine arts.

vocab.meaning: dựa vào (kiến thức/kỹ năng đã học khi gặp khó khăn)
vocab.example: Even now, I still fall back on the rigorous logical thinking habits my math teacher instilled in me.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu trở nên thích hoặc thiện cảm với ai đó
vocab.example: Although she seemed strict at first, the whole class eventually warmed up to her dry sense of humor.

vocab.meaning: truyền lại (kiến thức, kinh nghiệm, niềm đam mê)
vocab.example: He didn't just teach facts; he passed on a genuine passion for environmental conservation.

vocab.meaning: nghiền ngẫm, suy nghĩ kỹ về (một ý tưởng)
vocab.example: She would often give us philosophical questions to mull over long after the bell had rung.
